scripts.format: prettier --check "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "docs/**/*.md" README.md package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.format:write: prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "docs/**/*.md" README.md package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.supabase:seed: npm run supabase:seed:reference && npm run supabase:seed:demo && npm run supabase:seed:diagnostic-tree && npm run supabase:seed:historical-import && npm run supabase:seed:current-records
scripts.bootstrap:prepare: npm run bootstrap:scan && npm run bootstrap:extract && npm run bootstrap:verify
scripts.bootstrap:seed-sql: npm run bootstrap:prepare && npm run bootstrap:finalize && node scripts/historical-import/verify-import.mjs --events data/bootstrap/events.final.review.jsonl && node scripts/historical-import/apply-reviewed-import.mjs --events data/bootstrap/events.final.review.jsonl --output supabase/seed/005_current_records_bootstrap.sql
scripts.import:inbox: node scripts/historical-import/scan-sources.mjs --mode inbox && node scripts/historical-import/extract-candidates.mjs --manifest data/bootstrap/inbox_source_manifest.jsonl --events data/bootstrap/inbox_events.review.jsonl --entries data/bootstrap/inbox_entries.review.jsonl --attachments data/bootstrap/inbox_attachments.review.jsonl && node scripts/historical-import/verify-import.mjs --manifest data/bootstrap/inbox_source_manifest.jsonl --events data/bootstrap/inbox_events.review.jsonl --entries data/bootstrap/inbox_entries.review.jsonl
